subject: Project pulse: canary execution in Auckland | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-8397
body: Here is a progress summary for the canary plan in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-8397. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
